75393.subject: Securitize Tokenizes Its Own Stock on Listing Day
75393.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Securitize](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/securitize-tokenizes-own-nyse-stock-secz-listing-day)**[ tokenizes its own NYSE stock on its first day public](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/securitize-tokenizes-own-nyse-stock-secz-listing-day)

* **[Strategy's Phong Le](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/strategy-ceo-phong-le-buys-11000-strc-shares-revocable-trust)**[ buys 11,000 STRC shares](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/strategy-ceo-phong-le-buys-11000-strc-shares-revocable-trust)

* **[MGUSD, Explained: How MoneyGram Built a Stablecoin](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/mgusd-moneygram-stablecoin-stellar-distribution-explainer)**[ (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/mgusd-moneygram-stablecoin-stellar-distribution-explainer)

* **[Warren](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/warren-bar-trump-family-crypto-profits-disclosure)**[ moves to bar the Trump family from crypto profits](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/warren-bar-trump-family-crypto-profits-disclosure)

* **[Voorhees](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/shapeshift-voorhees-defends-venice-token-terms-otc-deal)**[ defends Venice's token terms](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/shapeshift-voorhees-defends-venice-token-terms-otc-deal)

* **[ENS DAO](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ens-dao-sunsets-public-goods-working-group-after-4-5-years)**[ sunsets its Public Goods Working Group](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ens-dao-sunsets-public-goods-working-group-after-4-5-years)

* **[ZetaChain Bets on Private, User-Owned AI](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai)**[ (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai)

**Securitize** [put its own newly listed common stock onchain](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/securitize-tokenizes-own-nyse-stock-secz-listing-day) the same day **SECZ** began trading on the **NYSE**, issuing tokenized shares on **Avalanche** and **Solana** through its regulated platform. The company, the tokenization engine behind BlackRock's **BUIDL** fund, went public this week via a **Cantor** SPAC, and is the first newly public firm to mirror its own equity as a token.

The move is as much demo as milestone: a public company whose product is tokenized securities, using itself as the reference implementation. If regulated onchain shares can trade alongside the NYSE listing without friction, Securitize turns its own cap table into the sales pitch. The test is liquidity — whether the tokenized shares trade, or simply exist.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

———————————————————————————

##### WATCH

## Is ENS DAO Dead? Nick Johnson Faces His Critics

The governance fight beneath today's ENS story, live. ENS co-founder **Nick Johnson** used his voting power to move the DAO's treasury under a foundat

“The thing about football — the important thing about football — is that it is not just about football.”
_— __Terry Pratchett_



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/32c7727f-6e51-4df6-bd79-e7ca214b11a0/image.png?t=1783028723)
Caption: 

# Thursday links

[The beautiful, distracting game](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=6970502&__cf_chl_f_tk=u01xWdBLULA9isIiLzU_p8jnA7ymKe7RK3XVdQR4o6k-1782954778-1.0.1.1-BOIa0.wqyXcz2MwUOyXRHzkjmxOxwDg6vv7DrFwoj7I)

When England played Argentina in the 2002 World Cup, it was in the middle of the trading day, London time. But the market might as well have been closed because trading came to a complete stop. 

The three trading screens I sat in front of in those years were jammed full of stock quotes, the prices constantly blinking — green when a price ticked up and red when it ticked down. As soon as the match kicked off, though, there was so little blinking I thought for a moment my screens had frozen. 

No one was trading because everyone was watching the game.

A new study has quantified what I saw on my screens: the World Cup disrupts financial markets by robbing them of attention. 

“The same cultural phenomenon that generates billions in revenue appears to simultaneously withdraw investor attention from financial markets,” Yosef Bonaparte finds, “compressing trading volume, depressing market sentiment, and producing measurable negative abnormal returns in the US stock market.”

Bonaparte (who I’m guessing is rooting for _Les Blues_) frames the World Cup “as a natural experiment in mass cognitive reallocation” — and finds that it causes asset prices to deviate from fundamental values in “predictable and measurable ways.”

Fascinating.

He unfortunately begins with an own goal: “For the first time in the tournament’s history,” he says of the current tournament, “the United States is a primary host nation.”

Interesting! Roberto Baggio would be relieved to learn that his memory of blasting a penalty kick over the crossbar in Pasadena, California was just a dream, and _not_ the worst moment in Italian sporting history.

Unfortunately, I can prove it was real: the World Cup hosted by the US in 1994 is why we’ve had to s

75382.subject: Important updates to your MetaMask CL Card agreements
75382.body:
Important Update Regarding Your Card 
Dear Oleh

We’re reaching out to let you know about a small, behind-the-scenes update to 
the providers that support your MetaMask CL Card. First, the good news: there’s 
nothing you need to do. Your card and the way you use your account all stay 
exactly the same. We just believe you should always know who’s looking after 
your account. Here’s what’s changing, and why:

From 1 July 2026, the crypto-asset services in your account will be powered by 
MoonPay Europe B.V., a crypto-asset service provider authorized under the EU 
Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) by the Netherlands Authority for the 
Financial Markets (AFM). Your card and payments providers continue unchanged.

This change does not alter the terms of your agreement with us. The updated 
terms that apply to the crypto-asset services are MoonPay’sTerms of Use 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/terms_of_use_europe> and Privacy Policy 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/privacy_policy>.

We’re proud to keep powering your MetaMask CL Card.

Questions about this update, or anything else on your account? We’re always 
happy to help at metamask@cl-cards.com <mailto:support@cl-cards.com>.

Need a new card? You can order one in the app in a couple of taps, and don’t 
forget you can delegate and spend straight from your wallet.

Crypto-asset services are provided by MoonPay Europe B.V., authorized by the 
Netherlands Authority for the Financial Markets
(AFM) under Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA). Card and payment services are 
provided by Monavate Ltd, The Officers Mess Business Centre, Royston Road, 
Duxford,Cambridge, England, CB22 4QH
Unsubscribe 
<https://links.cl-cards.com/s/u/SiQ5AD4WG0u6jZlbDv-szh-il9QkEQ71njmDn-dBiCUfN6hxuhb3aQxuoEfI_4dCx_SaHmZg7ZrymRTUDsQfQzJYmGJsICucyuDvBin9LDGcybkapoMmbeTeXCMf11u3MeAA1EK7aQ6BoHaZQv3BRz5n8kQlSQt9aZ6ndM0DQE9t0VKBIW7P_5ZpMv6n/uQhGfkvsprPzLWOPljn1rZz5zHOjmEC5/22>

75304.subject: POZVÁNKA
75304.body:
Dobrý deň naši snúbenci,

rada by som Vás pozvala na osobné stretnutie pred Vašou svadobnou 
hostinou, ktorá sa bude konať u nás na Bukovine.
Rada by som s Vami prebrala detaily svadby, stretnutie, kde bude 
prítomná už aj moja koordinátorka spravidla trvá cca 1,5 hodinky, prosím 
pripravte si dostatočné časové okno.
Vedeli by ste nám dať časový nástrel stretnutia, aby sme spoločne našli 
prienik v kalendároch?
Sme na Bukovine viac menej denne od cca 8.00 do 16.30 hod.

Ďakujem!
S pozdravom
-- 

Mgr. Michaela Bilá

Head manager Bukovina

+421908 849 791

www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]

75208.subject: Quick Hello from Runable!
75208.body:
Hi,

I'm Abhijeet from team Runable. You're one of our most active users, and I
wanted to reach out personally.

We're looking to feature a few people from our community, and before
anything, I'd just love to connect and hear about your experience, what's
working for you, what's getting in your way, and how Runable has been for
you so far.

Would you be open to a quick chat? Please select your preferred time slot:
https://calendly.com/abhijeet-runable/30min

Thanks for being with us,

Abhijeet
Team Runable
